name: stellar-batch-payment-monorepo
description: Monorepo para backend (Express/TypeScript), frontend (NextJS) y contratos (Soroban)

scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:contract"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:contract
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:contract
scripts.clean: rimraf node_modules && npm run clean:backend && npm run clean:frontend && npm run clean:contract
